items.title_en: The World Cup could add $17 billion to the U.S. economy. Here are the stocks set to benefit
items.title_zh: 世界杯可为美国经济增加 170 亿美元。以下是受益的股票
items.desc_en: The 2026 World Cup could add $17 billion to the U.S. economy, largely driven by digital advertising, travel and consumer spending.

items.title_en: This Chinese consumer stock could double if its global industrial pivot succeeds, JPMorgan says
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，如果其全球工业重心成功，中国的消费类股票可能会增加一倍
items.desc_en: A Chinese home appliance company has the chance to become a global player, JPMorgan analysts said in a report that gave several stocks an overweight rating.
items.desc_zh: 摩根大通分析师在一份报告中表示，一家中国家电公司有机会成为全球参与者，该报告给予多只股票增持评级。

items.title_en: A year after Meta tapped Alexandr Wang to build a new AI model, Zuckerberg has to sell it

items.desc_en: Mark Zuckerberg's mega spending spree began a year ago, when he lured Alexandr Wang to oversee a new AI strategy. The results so far are underwhelming.
items.desc_zh: 马克·扎克伯格的巨额支出始于一年前，当时他吸引亚历山大·王来监督一项新的人工智能战略。迄今为止的结果并不令人印象深刻。

items.title_en: Trump heads to G7 summit in France as world awaits Iran deal
items.title_zh: 特朗普前往法国参加七国集团峰会，世界等待伊朗协议
items.desc_en: The Iran war has drawn the world's focus, but the G7 is also likely to address Russia's war against Ukraine, which continues to rage in eastern Europe.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗战争吸引了世界的焦点，但七国集团也可能会讨论俄罗斯对乌克兰的战争，这场战争仍在东欧肆虐。

items.desc_zh: 捷蓝航空面临来自美国航空大本营迈阿密国际机场的激烈竞争。

items.title_en: Swiss voters reject 10 million population cap, early projections say
items.title_zh: 初步预测称瑞士选民拒绝接受1000万人口上限

items.desc_zh: 并非所有选票都已清点，但目前的趋势表明 55% 的参与者投票反对该提案。

items.title_en: Elon Musk drifted from Larry Page over a decade ago, but their companies are closer than ever
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克十多年前就与拉里·佩奇分道扬镳，但他们的公司比以往任何时候都更加亲密
items.desc_en: SpaceX and Google have a long and complicated relationship, but they were both celebrating this week after Elon Musk's company held its blockbuster IPO.
items.desc_zh: SpaceX 和谷歌有着长期而复杂的关系，但本周，埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的公司举行了轰动一时的 IPO，两家公司都在庆祝。

items.title_en: Fifa to pay Somali referee Artan full World Cup fee
items.title_zh: 国际足联将向索马里裁判阿坦支付全额世界杯费用
items.desc_en: Somali referee Omar Artan, who was denied entry to the United States to officiate at the World Cup, will still receive his tournament fee from Fifa in full.

items.title_en: Armed men kidnap high-ranking security official in Haiti
items.title_zh: 武装人员绑架海地高级安全官员
items.desc_en: James Boyard's abduction is the highest-ranking abduction in the violence-wracked country in recent years, according to reports.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，詹姆斯·博亚德的绑架案是这个饱受暴力蹂躏的国家近年来最严重的绑架案。

items.title_en: Why the US economy keeps defying the odds
items.title_zh: 为什么美国经济不断逆境而行
items.desc_en: Why has the American economy continued to outperform so many of its peers, despite facing the same global shocks?
items.desc_zh: 尽管面临同样的全球冲击，为什么美国经济的表现仍继续优于许多其他国家？

items.title_en: Nigerian author accuses hospital of stalling review into her son's death
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚作家指责医院拖延对她儿子死亡的审查
items.desc_en: Adichie's 21-month old son died in a Lagos hospital, which she says is trying to stop an inquest into the circumstances of his death.
items.desc_zh: Adichie 21 个月大的儿子在拉各斯一家医院去世，她说该医院正在试图阻止对其死因的调查。

items.title_en: As Trump turns 80, what's it really like to work as an octogenarian?
items.title_zh: 特朗普80岁了，作为一个八旬老人工作到底是什么感觉？
items.desc_en: As President Donald Trump celebrates his birthday, we ask people who have worked into their 80s themselves about what it takes to keep going.
items.desc_zh: 在唐纳德·特朗普总统庆祝他的生日之际，我们向那些已经工作到 80 多岁的人们询问如何才能继续前进。

items.title_en: Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' loved ones killed in Ukraine
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯家庭利用人工智能“复活”在乌克兰遇害的亲人
items.desc_en: The highly controversial trend lies at the intersection of Russia's war on Ukraine, new AI technologies and grief.
items.desc_zh: 这一备受争议的趋势出现在俄罗斯对乌克兰的战争、新的人工智能技术和悲伤的交汇点上。

items.title_en: Norway braces for verdict in rape trial of crown princess's son Høiby

items.desc_en: Marius Borg Høiby will appear via video link, almost three months after his trial came to an end on 40 charges, including four counts of rape.
items.desc_zh: 马吕斯·博格·霍伊比 (Marius Borg Høiby) 将通过视频连线出庭，此时距离他的 40 项指控（包括四项强奸罪）的审判结束近三个月。

items.desc_en: The fake ads feature the governor of the Bank of England - the Bank has urged people to report them.
items.desc_zh: 这些虚假广告的主角是英格兰银行行长，该银行已敦促人们举报这些广告。

items.desc_en: Meta has accused the EU of "regulatory overreach" and says its decision will allow tech giants like OpenAI free access to WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: Meta 指责欧盟“监管越权”，并表示其决定将允许 OpenAI 等科技巨头免费使用 WhatsApp。

items.desc_zh: 武装部队正在试验人形机器人，但距离战场部署还有一段距离。

items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 背后的公司在 Anthropic 提交计划一周后也提出了同样的计划。

items.desc_zh: 在对“裸体”应用程序的广泛审查中，这家科技巨头还推出了一系列新的儿童安全功能。

items.desc_zh: 加密货币平台 FTX 的前领导人目前正在服刑 25 年，周一正式申请赦免。
